name: Classic Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna sheets in a large pot of boiling water until just tender; drain most of the water; add ice cubes to stop cooking. Let stand in cold water to prevent pasta from sticking together.
2. In a saucepan, brown meat with onion and garlic. Drain off excess fat.
3. Over low heat, covered, cook for about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in mushrooms with liquid, tomato spaghetti sauce, tomato paste, salt, and oregano. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Combine egg with spinach, creamed cottage cheese, and grated parmesan cheese.
6. Spread one-third of the meat sauce in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Cover with one-fourth of lasagna (about five overlapping strips).
8. Alternate another one-third of sauce and one-fourth of lasagna.
9. Spread spinach mixture over pasta and cover with one-fourth of lasagna strips.
10. Top with remaining sauce and pasta.
11. Arrange mozzarella cheese on top.
12. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
